languages.text: "Я не смогу исполнить ваш приказ, Лорд-капитан, даже если пожелаю. Простите, но я не отягощен столь глубокими познаниями в священных механизмах Омниссии… в отличие от генетора Ферренца." {n}Впервые упоминание коллеги пробуждает в голосе Мартинакса нотки воодушевления.{/n} "Однако вынужден предупредить: он может счесть недостойным себя прикосновение к столь сомнительной и еретической технологии".

traits.locale_text: "Я не смогу исполнить ваш приказ, Лорд-капитан, даже если пожелаю. Простите, но я не отягощен столь глубокими познаниями в священных механизмах Омниссии… в отличие от генетора Ферренца. {n}Впервые упоминание коллеги пробуждает в голосе Мартинакса нотки воодушевления.{/n} Однако вынужден предупредить: он может счесть недостойным себя прикосновение к столь сомнительной и еретической технологии".

languages.text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."
languages.original_text: "Я не смогу исполнить ваш приказ, Лорд-капитан, даже если пожелаю. Простите, но я не отягощен столь глубокими познаниями в священных механизмах Омниссии… в отличие от генетора Ферренца." {n}Впервые упоминание коллеги пробуждает в голосе Мартинакса нотки воодушевления.{/n} "Однако вынужден предупредить: он может счесть недостойным себя прикосновение к столь сомнительной и еретической технологии".

traits.locale_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, despite my wishes. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax' voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however: he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

"I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, despite my wishes. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax' voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however: he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

"I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

languages.text: “舰长大人，无论我意愿如何，我都无法执行您的命令。恕我无能，我并未掌握欧姆尼赛亚神圣机械的深奥知识……不像基因士费伦茨那样。”{n}马丁纳克斯提到他的同僚时，声音里头一次流露出一丝兴奋。{/n}“不过我必须提醒您——他或许会认为触碰如此可疑又异端的科技有失他的身份。”
languages.original_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，无论我意愿如何，我都无法执行您的命令。恕我无能，我并未掌握欧姆尼赛亚神圣机械的深奥知识……不像基因士费伦茨那样。”{n}马丁纳克斯提到他的同僚时，声音里头一次流露出一丝兴奋。{/n}“不过我必须提醒您——他或许会认为触碰如此可疑又异端的科技有失他的身份。”

languages.text: «Me resulta imposible cumplir su orden, Lord Capitán, tanto si me gusta como si no. Le ruego que me perdone, pero no he sido agraciado con el conocimiento detallado de los sagrados mecanismos del Omnissiah... a diferencia del genetor Ferrenz». {n}Por primera vez distingues una chispa de entusiasmo en la voz de Martinax cuando menciona a su colega.{/n} «No obstante, me veo en la obligación de advertirle: cabe la posibilidad de que no se digne a tocar una tecnología de tan turbia y herética naturaleza».
languages.original_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

traits.locale_text: «Me resulta imposible cumplir su orden, Lord Capitán, tanto si me gusta como si no. Le ruego que me perdone, pero no he sido agraciado con el conocimiento detallado de los sagrados mecanismos del Omnissiah... a diferencia del genetor Ferrenz». {n}Por primera vez distingues una chispa de entusiasmo en la voz de Martinax cuando menciona a su colega.{/n} «No obstante, me veo en la obligación de advertirle: cabe la posibilidad de que no se digne a tocar una tecnología de tan turbia y herética naturaleza».

languages.text: « Je suis dans l'incapacité d'obéir à cet ordre, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, même si je le voulais. Pardonnez-moi, mais je ne bénéficie pas d'une connaissance aussi profonde des mécanismes sacrés de l'Omnimessie... contrairement au genetor Ferrenz. » {n}Pour la première fois, vous entendez la voix de Martinax s'animer en parlant de son collègue.{/n} « Je dois cependant vous prévenir qu'il pourrait bien juger qu'il est indigne de lui de toucher à une technologie douteuse et hérétique comme celle-ci. »
languages.original_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis dans l'incapacité d'obéir à cet ordre, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, même si je le voulais. Pardonnez-moi, mais je ne bénéficie pas d'une connaissance aussi profonde des mécanismes sacrés de l'Omnimessie... contrairement au genetor Ferrenz. » {n}Pour la première fois, vous entendez la voix de Martinax s'animer en parlant de son collègue.{/n} « Je dois cependant vous prévenir qu'il pourrait bien juger qu'il est indigne de lui de toucher à une technologie douteuse et hérétique comme celle-ci. »

languages.text: "Ich kann Euren Befehl nicht ausführen, Lord Captain, ob ich es will oder nicht. Verzeiht mir, aber ich bin nicht mit einem derart profunden Wissen über die heiligen Mechanismen des Omnissiah gesegnet ... wie Genetor Ferrenz." {n}Bei der Erwähnung des Namens seines Kollegen erkennst du erstmals einen Hauch von Begeisterung in Martinax' Stimme.{/n} "Ich fühle mich allerdings genötigt, Euch zu warnen ... er könnte es als unter seiner Würde erachten, eine so zweifelhafte und ketzerische Technologie zu berühren."
languages.original_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann Euren Befehl nicht ausführen, Lord Captain, ob ich es will oder nicht. Verzeiht mir, aber ich bin nicht mit einem derart profunden Wissen über die heiligen Mechanismen des Omnissiah gesegnet ... wie Genetor Ferrenz." {n}Bei der Erwähnung des Namens seines Kollegen erkennst du erstmals einen Hauch von Begeisterung in Martinax' Stimme.{/n} "Ich fühle mich allerdings genötigt, Euch zu warnen ... er könnte es als unter seiner Würde erachten, eine so zweifelhafte und ketzerische Technologie zu berühren."

languages.text: "İstesem de istemesem de emrinizi yerine getiremem Lord Kaptan. Beni affedin ancak Hermesih'in kutsal mekanizmaları hakkında böylesine derin bir bilgiyle lütuflandırılmadım... Genetör Ferrenz'in aksine." {n}Meslektaşının adının geçmesiyle Martinax'ın sesinde ilk kez bir heyecan kıvılcımı parlıyor.{/n} "Ancak sizi uyarmak zorundayım. Böylesine şüpheli ve kâfirce bir teknolojiye dokunmayı kendine yediremeyebilir."
languages.original_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."

traits.locale_text: "İstesem de istemesem de emrinizi yerine getiremem Lord Kaptan. Beni affedin ancak Hermesih'in kutsal mekanizmaları hakkında böylesine derin bir bilgiyle lütuflandırılmadım... Genetör Ferrenz'in aksine." {n}Meslektaşının adının geçmesiyle Martinax'ın sesinde ilk kez bir heyecan kıvılcımı parlıyor.{/n} "Ancak sizi uyarmak zorundayım. Böylesine şüpheli ve kâfirce bir teknolojiye dokunmayı kendine yediremeyebilir."

languages.text: 「ご命令に従うことができない、艦長様。今、望んでも、望まなくても。申し訳ありませんが、私はオムニシアの聖なる機構について、ジェネター・フェレンツほど深い知識を持っていません…」{n}同僚の話題で、初めてマルティナックスの口から興奮の音が漏れる。{/n}「ただ、警告しておきますが、彼は、このような疑わしい異端の技術に触れるのは、自分には下品だと考えるかもしれません。」
languages.original_text: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."
